description: Set the value of clump attributes. This command is a synonym for the clump initialize command. Individual attributes can be listed with the clump list command and all attributes can be visualized. Clump attributes are characteristics of the clumps such as position or size. These are distinct from clump properties (assigned with the clump property command) that are surface properties of the clumps that are used to fill contact model properties.

modifiers.name: gradient
modifiers.description: Apply linear gradient in each axis direction starting at origin

modifiers.name: gradient-x/y/z
modifiers.description: Apply linear gradient in specific direction starting at origin

notes: Modification of clump geometry will fail if the resulting clump would not fall entirely within the model domain
Be aware of the distinction between attributes and properties! See tutorial 'Attributes and Properties' for details
Specifying moment of inertia or volume via command line sets them to fixed state (not auto-updated when scaling/changing density)

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use Clump.set_*() methods (e.g., Clump.set_density(), Clump.set_vel(), Clump.set_pos()) - requires iteration over clump range

keywords.name: damp
keywords.description: Clump local damping coefficient where f > 0. By default, f = 0.

keywords.name: density
keywords.description: Clump density where f > 0. By default f = 0.

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: Accumulated clump displacement vector as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the accumulated clump displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: euler-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -euler angle (in degrees) of the current clump orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: euler-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -euler angle (in degrees) of the current clump orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: euler-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -euler angle (in degrees) of the current clump orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: force-applied
keywords.description: Force vector applied to clumps.

keywords.name: force-contact
keywords.description: Sum of the contact force accumulated to the clumps during the previous force-displacement update. This value will be modified during the next force-displacement update.

keywords.name: force-contact-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the contact force.

keywords.name: force-contact-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of the contact force.

keywords.name: force-contact-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of the contact force.

keywords.name: fragment
keywords.description: Fragment ID (see “ Fragment ”).

keywords.name: moi-11
keywords.description: 11 component of the clump real moment of inertia. When modified, only the clump principal moments of inertia are modified and the other clump attributes are not changed (e.g., volume, pebble sizes). The specification of the clump principal moments of inertia via the command line or via FISH results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a clump, changing the volume, or changing the density. The fix state can be modified in FISH (see the clump.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: moi-12
keywords.description: 12 component of the clump real moment of inertia. keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Location of clump centroid.

keywords.name: position-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the location of clump centroids.

keywords.name: position-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of the location of clump centroids.

keywords.name: position-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of the location of clump centroids.

keywords.name: rotation
keywords.description: Current clump orientation. The orientation is updated only when orientation tracking has been enabled (see model orientation-tracking command).

keywords.name: spin
keywords.description: Clump angular velocity in radians per second.

keywords.name: spin-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the clump angular velocity in radians per second.

keywords.name: spin-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of the clump angular velocity in radians per second.

keywords.name: spin-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of the clump angular velocity in radians per second.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Clump translational velocity vector.

keywords.name: velocity-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the clump velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of the clump velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of the clump velocity.

keywords.name: volume
keywords.description: Clump volume. When modified, only the clump mass and real mass are modified and the other clump attributes based on volume are not changed (e.g., moment of inertia, pebble sizes). The specification of the volume via the command line or via FISH results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a clump, changing the volume, or changing the density. The fixity state of the inertia can be modified in FISH (see the clump.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: kwd:add
keywords.description: Add f to the existing value.

keywords.name: kwd:gradient
keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient in each of the axes directions starting at the origin.

keywords.name: kwd:gradient-x
keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient in the \(x\) -direction starting at the origin.

keywords.name: kwd:gradient-y
keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient in the \(y\) -direction starting at the origin.

keywords.name: kwd:gradient-z
keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient in the \(z\) -direction starting at the origin.

keywords.name: kwd:multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the existing value by f .

keywords.name: kwd:replace
keywords.description: Replace the existing value with f .

examples.description: Set density to 1000 and local damping coefficient to 0.7 for all clumps (most common usage)
Set velocity for clump with ID 102
Apply constant force to clumps in group (not updated during cycling)

examples.command: clump attribute volume 0.5 multiply 1.2 range id 1 100
examples.description: Multiply volume by 1.2 for clumps with ID 1-100 (sets moment of inertia to fixed state)
